basic_details.job_title: TIFR Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Fundamental Research (TIFR) has released the official Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 at its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the TIFR Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates below 28 years of age with a qualification of M.Sc. degree in Basic Sciences or Graduate/Post Graduate degree in Professional Courses along with qualification in a National Level Eligibility Test and proficiency in analytical, numerical calculations, and coding using Python and C/C++/Fortran can apply through Email mode on or before

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Below 28 years as on closing date of application.
age_limit.details: Junior Research Fellow [JRF]: Below 28 years as on closing date of application.

qualification.education_qualification: MSc. degree (Post Graduate Degree in Basic Sciences or Graduate/ Post Graduate degree in Professional Course and should qualify for at least one National level Eligibility Test such as CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship, GATE, National Level Examination conducted by Central Government Dept. and their Agencies, and institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc., IISER, TIFR, etc. Proficiency in analytical and numerical calculations and sound knowledge in coding using Python and C/C++/Fortran.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow [JRF]: MSc. degree (Post Graduate Degree in Basic Sciences or Graduate/ Post Graduate degree in Professional Course and should qualify for at least one National level Eligibility Test such as CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship, GATE, National Level Examination conducted by Central Government Dept. and their Agencies, and institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc., IISER, TIFR, etc.) Proficiency in both analytical and numerical calculations and sound knowledge in coding using Python and C/C++/Fortran.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow [JRF]: ₹37,000/- per month +30% HRA (as admissible)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TIFR Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download TIFR Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for TIFR Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: TIFR Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TIFR JRF position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at TIFR is 15th August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold an MSc. degree in Basic Sciences or a Graduate/Post Graduate degree in a Professional Course and qualify for a national-level eligibility test like CSIR-UGC NET or GATE. Proficiency in analytical calculations and coding in Python, C/C++, or Fortran is also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is below 28 years as of the closing date of the application.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selected Junior Research Fellow will receive a stipend of ₹37,000/- per month plus 30% House Rent Allowance (HRA) as admissible.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the TIFR JRF position?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email by sending a single zip file containing their CV, MSc. thesis report (if applicable), degree certificates, mark sheets, qualifying examination certificate, names of referees, and a cover letter to Dr. Suvodip Mukherjee at [email protected].

faq.question: Q6. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Junior Research Fellow recruitment is 2026/20.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the TIFR JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will involve an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this post?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Which city and state is this TIFR recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for TIFR located in Mumbai, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position at TIFR is a project-based job.
